package router

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for router_constructor_builds_concrete_dependencies: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Router setup that creates DB clients, external clients, or repositories directly instead of receiving prebuilt dependencies.
type CaseRouterConstructorBuildsConcreteDependenciesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRouterConstructorBuildsConcreteDependenciesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRouterConstructorBuildsConcreteDependenciesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRouterConstructorBuildsConcreteDependenciesModel
}

type CaseRouterConstructorBuildsConcreteDependenciesService struct {
    repo *CaseRouterConstructorBuildsConcreteDependenciesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRouterConstructorBuildsConcreteDependenciesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRouterConstructorBuildsConcreteDependencies(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRouterConstructorBuildsConcreteDependenciesDTO) error {

    dsn := "host=localhost user=app password=secret dbname=app port=5432 sslmode=disable"
    gormDB, err := gorm.Open(nil, &gorm.Config{})
    if err != nil {
        log.Fatalf("failed to connect: %v", err)
    }
    sqlDB, err := sql.Open("postgres", dsn)
    if err != nil {
        log.Fatalf("failed to open sql: %v", err)
    }
    repo := &CaseRouterConstructorBuildsConcreteDependenciesRepository{db: gormDB, sql: sqlDB}
    _ = repo
    _ = err
    return nil
}
